summary: Iteration 100: BIQc Platform Phase 3 Feature Testing - Competitive Benchmark page, Decision Outcome Recording, Push Notification endpoint. All features working on preview URL. Backend checkpoint-outcome endpoint working. Register-device endpoint works on preview URL but returns 404 on beta.thestrategysquad.com (deployment sync issue).

action_items: Deploy backend changes to beta.thestrategysquad.com to sync register-device endpoint
critical_code_review_comments: GOOD: CompetitiveBenchmarkPage has proper data-testid attributes for all cards (score-card, percentile-card, pillars-card)
GOOD: DecisionsPage form validation checks for required fields before submit
GOOD: Checkpoint outcome buttons only show for due checkpoints (scheduled_at <= now)
GOOD: register-device endpoint gracefully handles missing push_devices table
INFO: Mobile push notifications (Expo) cannot be tested in browser - requires physical device or simulator

success_rate.backend: 86% (5/7 tests passed - register-device 404 on beta only)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 3 features verified: Competitive Benchmark page (/competitive-benchmark) shows Digital Footprint score, Industry Ranking percentile, and 5-Pillar breakdown. Decision Outcome Recording on /decisions has expandable cards with Effective/Ineffective buttons for due checkpoints. Backend checkpoint-outcome endpoint works. Register-device endpoint works on preview URL but not deployed to beta. Mobile push notifications use Expo and cannot be browser-tested. Preview URL: https://truth-engine-19.preview.emergentagent.com
